channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Friendship Apps Gaining Popularity to Combat Social Isolation
item.description: In recent years, the quest for meaningful friendships has gained momentum as loneliness and social isolation have grown. Remote workers and young adults, in particular, are seeking ways to build socia...

item.title: 78-year-old man fatally stabbed in Eastern Cape over personal dispute
item.description: In a tragic incident in Qumbu, Eastern Cape, a 78-year-old man was fatally stabbed following a personal dispute involving a 65-year-old woman. Police reports indicate that the elderly man was at his h...

item.title: Middle East Conflict Continues to Push Oil Prices Up
item.description: Oil prices have increased amid ongoing disruptions in the Middle East caused by the conflict between the United States, Israel, and Iran. As of April 6, 2026, Brent crude futures climbed to $110.74 pe...

item.title: Tanzania signs joint venture to develop Mererani graphite for industrial growth
item.description: Tanzania is making big moves in the global minerals scene after Planet One Group and the State Mining Corporation (Stamico) signed a joint venture to develop three graphite concessions in the Mererani...

item.title: Seven injured as hotel ceiling collapses in Benidorm on Easter Sunday
item.description: On Easter Sunday, a ceiling collapse at the three-star Poseidón Palace hotel in Benidorm resulted in injuries to at least seven holidaymakers. Approximately 60 guests were dining in the main restauran...

item.title: Plasma Therapy Restores Vision for Mother Who Became Blind After Childbirth
item.description: Jessica Kent-Hazledine, a 33-year-old mother from Cornwall, lost her vision shortly after giving birth to her first child, leaving her terrified she would never see her son grow up. Initially, she not...

item.title: Community Easter Events Bring Families Together in Saskatoon
item.description: Families across Saskatoon enjoyed a variety of activities over the Easter long weekend, celebrating community and springtime traditions. On Saturday, Optimist Hill hosted an Easter egg hunt, where chi...

item.title: High Court upholds CCTV installation in KZN classrooms despite teacher boycott
item.description: The Pietermaritzburg High Court has ruled in favour of maintaining CCTV cameras in classrooms at uMkhumbane Secondary School in Mayville, Durban, following a boycott by nearly 20 teachers from the Sou...

item.title: Key Updates: Tamil Nadu and West Bengal Polls, U.S.-Iran Tensions, Fuel Pricing, and Regional Developments
item.description: The Morning Digest of April 6, 2026, provides a roundup of significant political, economic, and international developments. In India, the last day for filing nominations for the Tamil Nadu Assembly el...

item.title: Trump’s emotional outburst on social media highlights risky decision-making
item.description: US President Donald Trump has once again showcased his impulsive and emotional approach to diplomacy, this time through a profanity-laden post on his social media platform, Truth Social. Analysts warn...

item.title: Voters in Assam prioritise welfare schemes over grievances on Zubeen Garg’s death
item.description: In Assam, the death of beloved singer Zubeen Garg by drowning in Singapore in September has sparked widespread mourning and protests, with many citizens questioning the state government's handling of ...

item.title: Bangladesh battles measles outbreak as nearly 100 children die
item.description: Bangladesh is facing a serious public health challenge as a suspected measles outbreak has reportedly claimed the lives of about 98 children over the past three weeks. The Health Ministry reported tha...

item.title: Motorcyclist dies in Scarborough collision
item.description: A tragic traffic accident occurred in Scarborough, Toronto, resulting in the death of a 21-year-old motorcyclist. The incident took place on a busy roadway, prompting a response from local emergency s...

item.title: Mbavu Destroyer Loses to Majembe in Emotional Boxing Match at Kasarani
item.description: The much-anticipated boxing bout between amateur fighters Majembe and Mbavu Destroyer at Kasarani Indoor Arena ended dramatically in the fourth round. Majembe won by technical knockout after a controv...

item.title: NSW Government Investigated for Alleged Racial Discrimination by Human Rights Commission
item.description: The Australian Human Rights Commission has opened an investigation into a complaint against Steve Kamper, the NSW Minister for Multiculturalism, and his department over alleged racial discrimination t...

item.title: UK benefits and state pension rise as two-child cap is abolished
item.description: As the new financial year begins, several UK benefits and the state pension are set to increase. Most notably, the two-child limit on universal credit has been removed, meaning around 480,000 families...

item.title: Trump Contemplates Select Cabinet Changes Amid Growing Iran War Pressures
item.description: US President Donald Trump is reportedly considering a broader reshuffle of his cabinet following the recent dismissal of Attorney General Pam Bondi. Sources close to White House deliberations indicate...

item.title: Albanese's Government Faces Challenges in Economic and Supply Chain Resilience
item.description: The article critiques Prime Minister Anthony Albanese's handling of Australia's economic and supply chain resilience over the past four years. Drawing a parallel with former Prime Minister Gough Whitl...

item.title: B.C. boy celebrates fifth birthday at local recycling centre
item.description: In Maple Ridge, B.C., five-year-old Himmat Rai celebrated his birthday in a truly unique way — at the local recycling centre. Unlike most children who might choose a party at a park or a play centre, ...

item.title: Durban man jailed for 25 years after attempting to murder his young nephew
item.description: A 27-year-old man in Durban has been sentenced to 25 years’ direct imprisonment for the attempted murder of his nine-year-old nephew. The incident occurred on 3 January 2024, when the accused lured th...
